params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two sets of 16-bit input vectors (Bx, By, Bz and Ax, Ay, Az) based on a control signal (ABn). When ABn is high (1), the outputs (Cx, Cy, Cz) take values from the second set of inputs (Bx, By, Bz); when ABn is low (0), the outputs take values from the first set (Ax, Ay, Az).
